case_title: DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS OF THE STATE VS. CHAVEZ STEEL et al

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD: GRANTED; NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER DISTRICT COUNCIL OF IRON WORKERS OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award: GRANTED; no opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
